explicit_non_delegation: This release gate does not close M07-LPR.
This release gate does not authorize opposable outputs.
This release gate does not replace the Final Compliance Gate of Level A.
This release gate only governs offline technical readiness of Level B validation assets.

required_suites.description: Schema and payload contract protection for Level B offline outputs.
Semantic non-delegation and offline admissibility checks.
Protection against M07-LPR closure or equivalent support-layer overreach.
Mandatory audit trail and SHADOW guarantees on critical Level B flows.
Propagation and observability of critical block conditions.
Traceability matrix consistency for Level B offline governance.
Frozen non-negotiable regression benchmark for Level B offline readiness.

release_outcomes.GO: All required suites are present and green. Offline Level B release track may proceed to controlled repository tagging.
release_outcomes.SUSPEND: At least one required suite failed, is missing or produced an execution error. Release must stop.
release_outcomes.ERROR: The gate itself is invalid or could not complete deterministically. Release must stop.

maintenance_rule: The manifest may change only with explicit version bump and documented rationale. It must remain independent from runtime, runner and retrieval logic.
